title: sphaeranthus suaveolens var. tetraphyllus
intro: Sphaeranthus suaveolens var. tetraphyllus, also known as the round flowered sphaeranthus, is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits associated with Sphaeranthus suaveolens var. tetraphyllus include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and protecting against cell damage. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and leaves can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
